# robots.txt — controls which paths web crawlers may index
# Portfolio pages are fully public and indexable.
# Raw asset directories are excluded to reduce crawler load
# and prevent unnecessary bandwidth on PDF/image bulk downloads.

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /PROJECTS/PDF%20Documentation/
Disallow: /PROJECTS/CLOUD%20PROJECTS/
Disallow: /assets/
Disallow: /pdf.worker.min.mjs

# Point crawlers to the canonical site
Sitemap: https://zenmier.com/sitemap.xml
